attempts.test_code:
import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None
def test_process_batch_all_items_processed():
    """Test that process_batch correctly processes all items in the list."""
    # Create a list with multiple items
    input_list = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
    
    # Call the function
    result = source.process_batch(input_list)
    
    # The buggy code skips the last item, so result length will be len(input_list) - 1
    # The fixed code should return a list with same length as input
    assert len(result) == len(input_list), \
        f"Expected {len(input_list)} items in result, got {len(result)}. Last item was skipped!"
    
    # Also verify each item is correctly multiplied by 2
    for i, (input_val, output_val) in enumerate(zip(input_list, result)):
        assert output_val == input_val * 2, \
            f"At index {i}: expected {input_val * 2}, got {output_val}"
